quotes: Peace begins with a smile.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Stay hungry, stay foolish.
Be the change you wish to see in the world.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Dream big and dare to fail.
Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Never bend your head. Always hold it high. Look the world straight in the eye.
What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
Without mental strength, you are nothing. With it, you are everything.
You do not find a happy life. You make it.
Inspiration exists, but it has to find you working.
Don't count the days, make the days count.
Keep your face always toward the sunshine, and shadows will fall behind you.
No pressure, no diamonds.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
The power of imagination makes us infinite.
Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
The best way to predict the future is to create it.
You miss 100 percent of the shots you don't take.
Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
Change your thoughts and you change your world.
I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
Look up at the stars and not down at your feet.
Courage is grace under pressure.
Out of difficulties grow miracles.
Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
The route is tough but the destination is beautiful.
Your passion is waiting for your courage to catch up.
Nothing is impossible. The word itself says 'I'm possible!'
Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
Tough times never last, but tough people do.
Build your own dreams, or someone else will hire you to build theirs.
Focus on the journey, not the destination.
Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you have imagined.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
You must do the things you think you cannot do.
Turn your wounds into wisdom.
Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
Do one thing every day that scares you.
Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
Make each day your masterpiece.
Keep trying. The path is narrow but the reward is eternal.
We may encounter many defeats but we must not be defeated.
Begin to be now what you will be hereafter.
Every moment is a fresh beginning.
May you live all the days of your life.
If you cannot do great things, do small things in a great way.
Great thoughts speak only to the thoughtful mind.
There is no path to peace. Peace is the path.
Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
Whatever you are, be a good one.
Failure is the condiment that gives success its flavor.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
Remember that not getting what you want is sometimes a wonderful stroke of luck.
To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
If opportunity doesn't knock, build a door.
Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
It is never too late to be what you might have been.
Try to be a rainbow in someone's cloud.
Hope is a waking dream.
If you tell the truth, you don't have to remember anything.
A champion is defined not by their wins but by how they can recover when they fall.
Persistence guarantees that results are inevitable.
Wisdom begins in wonder.
The value of life lies not in the length of days, but in the use we make of them.
There is nothing permanent except change.
The function of leadership is to produce more leaders, not more followers.
Determine that the thing can and shall be done, and then we shall find the way.
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
Action is the foundational key to all success.
Live the life you've dreamed.
Light tomorrow with today.
The best preparation for tomorrow is doing your best today.
You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
It is by acts and not by ideas that people live.
Do what is right, not what is easy nor what is popular.
Concentrate all your thoughts upon the work at hand. The sun's rays do not burn until brought to a focus.
Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
The standard you walk past is the standard you accept.
Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
Be kind, for everyone you meet is fighting a harder battle.
In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
If you want to be happy, be.
